step1.title: Step 1
step1.description: Complete our quick, interactive questionnaire. Select your preferred flavors, decoration style, size, and the occasion. This takes just 2-3 minutes and helps us understand your unique taste and aesthetic vision.

step2.title: Step 2
step2.description: Our AI-powered system analyzes your preferences and generates several unique cake design concepts. Within seconds, you'll see visualized options that blend the latest patisserie trends with your personal requests, creating a truly personalized blueprint.

step3.title: Step 3
step3.description: Review the generated concepts. If needed, regenerate with one click or manually fine-tune the details—adjust the color palette, decorative elements, or inscriptions. Iterate until the design perfectly matches your vision before locking it in.

step4.title: Step 4
step4.description: Select your preferred delivery date, provide shipping details, and confirm your order. Then, all that's left is to look forward to the day your exclusive, custom-designed cake becomes the sweet centerpiece of your celebration.
